auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your details to access your account.
auth.forgotDesc: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
auth.resetSent: If an account exists, a reset link has been sent.
auth.verifyEmailNotice: Please verify your email before logging in. Check your inbox.
auth.verificationDesc: Please check your email to verify your account. If you didn't receive it, check your spam folder.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.termsAgreementRequired: Please agree to the Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, and Refund Policy before signing up.
